title: GraphQL Code Generator Documentation
citation: The Guild GraphQL Code Generator documentation, accessed 2026-05-03; npm package metadata queried for @graphql-codegen packages on 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Developer-tooling and GraphQL type-generation planning for OpenClinXR administrative workbenches.
claims_supported: GraphQL Code Generator is a plugin-based tool for generating typed GraphQL operations and resolver-related TypeScript artifacts.
The Guild documentation recommends the client preset for client applications and identifies lower-level TypeScript plugins for schema/type generation.
As queried on 2026-05-03, @graphql-codegen/cli 7.0.0, @graphql-codegen/client-preset 6.0.0, @graphql-codegen/typescript 6.0.0, and @graphql-codegen/typescript-resolvers 6.0.0 are MIT licensed.
claims_not_supported: That a GraphQL layer should replace the existing REST/runtime API before admin schema contracts stabilize.
That Apollo-specific generated hooks are compatible with every Apollo Client version without checking the selected version.
